caption: A man with glasses and a black t-shirt featuring a graphic design stands in front of a whiteboard, likely in a classroom or lecture setting. He is wearing a lanyard with an ID card around his neck. Initially, he has his hands clasped together in front of him, appearing to be in the middle of speaking. As the video progresses, he gestures with his right hand while holding the lanyard with his left, emphasizing a point as he continues to speak. The environment suggests an educational or professional presentation.
